# Pull Request

## Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

Example:

* Added support for migrating Tailwind classes inside `clsx()` calls
* Fixed bug where `node_modules` files were incorrectly scanned

---

## Type of Change

Please check the relevant option:

* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Code refactor
* [ ] Documentation update
* [ ] Performance improvement
* [ ] Test improvement
* [ ] Other (please describe)

---

## Related Issue

If this PR addresses an existing issue, please link it here.

Example:

```
Fixes #12
```

---

## Changes Made

List the main changes introduced in this pull request.

Example:

* Updated React class migration logic
* Added new Tailwind class mapping
* Improved project scanner

---

## How Has This Been Tested?

Explain how you tested the changes.

Example:

* Tested migration on a sample Tailwind v3 project
* Verified class transformations inside React components
* Confirmed no changes occur inside `node_modules`

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please confirm the following:

* [ ] Code follows the project structure
* [ ] Code has been tested locally
* [ ] No unnecessary files were modified
* [ ] Documentation updated if needed
* [ ] Commit messages follow project guidelines

---

## Screenshots (Optional)

If your change affects CLI output or functionality, please add screenshots or example outputs.

Example CLI output:

```
Scanning project...
Migrating CSS...
Updating Tailwind version...

Migration completed 🚀
```

---

## Additional Notes

Add any additional information that reviewers should know.
